title: 君たちが見ているならば

text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide and I are in the middle of a
training session, timing her runs to check her
performance.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm not making any personal bests today. In fact,
my times are getting worse...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Urgh! If this continues—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I need to check something. I'll be right
back.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What?! You're leaving already, Taishin?! C'mon,
we should cheer her on a little longer!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No thanks. I've seen enough.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hello, you two.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
OH! Hayahide! Fancy meeting you here! Taishin
and I were just—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Watching me run, right? I know. That's why I came
over here.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Please, don't leave yet. At least watch me run one
more lap.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Why do you want us to stick around?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Because you just watched my last run.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I'm not performing at my best
today...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I don't want you to think this is the best I can do!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to embarrass myself with such a
pitiful performance again. I'm going to show you
your rival's true potential!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Fine. You get one lap.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's enough for me! Ticket, would you also be
all right staying for one—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! Of course I'll stay!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Why are you crying?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm just sooo honored that you consider me to be a rivaaal!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe, well...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I feel the same way.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer, could you time me once more?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I need to keep improving. I can't break my
promise to them!
Biwa Hayahide runs her best time of the month.

From that day onward, her running improves
significantly.
